calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Co-Trustee On The Grounds Of Breach Of Trust And Refusal To Act According To The Trust Instrument And A Previous Court Order To Distribute Trust Property
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Off Calendar

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee On The Grounds Of Breach Of Trust And Refusal To Act According To The Trust Instrument And A Previous Court Order To Distribute Trust Property
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Continued To Jan-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonanno for petitioner Betty Cohn.

Mr. Bonanno stated that the parties had been making good progress to bring the dispute to resolution. He stated that he had received requested documents from the other trustee, that the Respondent had complied with the court order, and that he expected very shortly to be filing a dismissal. The matter was continued to January 19, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported).

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee On The Grounds Of Breach Of Trust And Refusal To Act According To The Trust Instrument And A Previous Court Order To Distribute Trust Property
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Continued To Dec-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Instruct Co-Trustees To Distribute Trust Property, Pursuant To Terms Of Trust, To Trust Beneficiaries And To Compel Co-Trustee...
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonanno for Betty Cohn.

Mr. Bonanno stated that he has the signed original notice of hearing with proof of service by mail, that he has received no response from Mr. Lindley and that Mr. Bennetado wanted a continuance but that he was not present. Mr. Bonanno also spoke of family conflict and stated that if there is no resolution, there may be a need to file a partition action. The Court directed to e file the proof of service and provide a copy to the Probate Examiner. The Petition to Instruct Co-Trustees to Distribute Trust Property, etc. was taken under submission (pending posting of the proof of service.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Instruct Co-Trustees To Distribute Trust Property, Pursuant To Terms Of Trust, To Trust Beneficiaries And To Compel Co-Trustee...
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Continued To Feb-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
